message:
test(fcp-conformance/mesh-planner-decision): pin AdjustmentFactor + DecisionReason 9-variant matrix + ScoreAdjustment + CandidateNode contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-og5lk)

19 tests complementing planner_lease_causality_conformance (which
exercised end-to-end ExecutionPlanner) — pins the FULL variant
matrix that flows into operator audit/triage output.

- AdjustmentFactor 5 variants distinct + Hash for HashMap-keyed
  score aggregation + Custom payload disambiguation
- DecisionReason 9 documented variants with payloads:
  SelectedAsBest{rank}, EligibleNotSelected{rank,better_count},
  MissingConnector{connector_id},
  IncompatibleVersion{connector_id,required,installed},
  LeaseConflict{holder,lease_purpose},
  ZoneRestriction{zone,reason}, HasLocalData{symbol_count},
  MissingRequiredSymbol{symbol_prefix}, Custom(String)
- DecisionReason Clone preserves payload via Debug equality (no
  PartialEq derived)
- ScoreAdjustment 3-field construction (factor, delta, explanation);
  negative delta = penalty (per docstring)
- CandidateNode 7-field construction; eligible-high-score
  documented state pinned; Clone preserves all fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
